# MCP Server Directory Scan — June 26, 2026
## Quick afternoon sweep — checking for new servers since June 25 scan

---

## NEW SERVERS FOUND (June 26)

### From mcpservers.org Latest Feed

1. **Serpzilla** ★ New
   - Category: Marketing / SEO
   - Purchase SEO placements (links, articles, reviews) on publisher sites
   - Manage projects, search sites by metrics, track placements via OAuth-secured API
   - Remote MCP: `mcp.serpzilla.com/mcp`
   - Business relevance: SEO agencies and operators managing paid link-building campaigns

2. **PubFi MCP** ★ New
   - Category: Finance / Crypto
   - Route crypto data needs through PubFi capability and gateway tools
   - MCP-native crypto data orchestration for AI agents
   - GitHub: `helixbox/pubfi-mono`
   - Business relevance: Operators managing multi-chain crypto data workflows

3. **zopnight** ★ New
   - Category: Cloud / FinOps
   - Query and govern AWS, GCP & Azure cloud estate from AI agents
   - Surfaces waste, cost, ownership, and 400+ audit findings across 200+ resource types
   - Also covers AI runtimes (Bedrock, Vertex AI)
   - URL: `zopnight.com/docs/integrations/mcp-server/overview`
   - Business relevance: FinOps operators managing multi-cloud infrastructure

4. **Quotor** ★ New
   - Category: Finance / Insurance
   - Real, bindable home & auto insurance quotes via MCP
   - Actual carrier rates (not estimates), Texas market with expansion planned
   - 11 tools, carrier-masked options, human-completed bind
   - URL: `quotor.ai`
   - Business relevance: Insurance operators and fintech platforms

### Also Seen (Not Added — Niche/Non-Business)

- **stealth-chrome-devtools-mcp**: Undetectable browser automation (nodriver/CDP-based) — similar to existing Human Browser entry
- **LSP-Claw**: Lua/LSP web app dev in controlled lab — too niche
- **specter-skills**: Game backend configuration — gaming niche
- **swiftui-microinteractions**: iOS animation skills — mobile dev only
